overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian armor walking through a grand temple complex. The character moves from an interior columned hall with hieroglyphics through transitional corridors into an open courtyard, then proceeds down a ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues and palm trees under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior temple hall with painted columns and hieroglyphics

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the interior temple hall passing large painted columns and hieroglyphic walls

notable_agents.action: temple worker walking alongside the ceremonial pool

entered.detail: large cylindrical columns with blue and yellow chevron patterns and colorful bases
stone walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphics and colorful figure reliefs
rectangular water pool with stone edges and green water
tall metal stand with a burning flame at the top

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an enclosed temple interior featuring massive painted columns with blue and yellow patterns and walls covered in hieroglyphics. A ceremonial pool sits to the left while scattered flower petals cover the stone floor. The lighting is diffused and sheltered from direct sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor leading to temple exit

events.description: exits the main temple hall into a narrower corridor with hieroglyphic walls
emerges from dim interior into bright sunlight streaming through the columned entrance

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow corridors and emerging from the temple interior toward the bright exterior

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near the wall observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large stone doorway marking the transition to the exterior
transitional space with columns where interior meets exterior light

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow corridors lined with hieroglyphics, transitioning from the dim interior toward a brightly lit entrance. The painted columns recede into the background as the character approaches a large stone doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with palm trees and ceremonial decorations

events.description: exits the temple structure into the open courtyard with palm trees
character brushes past an NPC while crossing the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the open courtyard passing other temple visitors and ceremonial decorations

notable_agents.action: temple visitor walking across the courtyard path
group of people standing near the avenue entrance

entered.detail: decorative black and gold planters containing tall palm trees
raised platform with golden decorations and offerings
large fabric canopy providing partial shade over the courtyard
monumental entrance leading to the ceremonial avenue with obelisks visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright open courtyard filled with large decorative palm planters and scattered flower petals. A stone altar with golden decorations sits to the left while the character approaches a monumental avenue entrance flanked by temple walls covered in exterior hieroglyphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues and obelisks

events.description: enters the grand ceremonial avenue flanked by large stone sphinx statues
passing market stalls with yellow canopies on the left side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the long ceremonial avenue toward the distant obelisks, passing between sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: child running ahead down the avenue toward the obelisks

entered.detail: large stone sphinx statues lining both sides of the avenue
tall dark obelisks marking the terminus of the ceremonial avenue
white fabric banners suspended between tall poles overhead
wooden market stalls with yellow canopies and displayed goods

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a grand ceremonial avenue lined with massive stone sphinx statues on both sides. White banners hang overhead between tall poles while market stalls with yellow canopies line the left side. In the distance, tall obelisks mark the end of the avenue under a bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered depths of a temple interior into a sprawling, sun-drenched ceremonial avenue. It begins within an enclosed hall of massive painted columns and hieroglyphics, where diffused light falls over a ceremonial pool and flower-strewn stone floors. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through narrow, dim corridors that gradually brighten, leading the camera toward a large stone doorway. The environment then opens into a brilliant courtyard filled with palm planters and a golden altar before passing through a monumental entrance flanked by exterior carvings. Finally, the view expands down a grand avenue lined with stone sphinxes and yellow market stalls, stretching toward distant obelisks under a clear blue sky.
